lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here?

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: Catching anglerfish! This is the only place you can find them!

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: I have heard good things about you, outsider, however, you will need to train your fishing skill before catching these.

lines.speaker: Fisherman
lines.text: You will need a fishing rod and some sandworms to use as bait. If you need supplies, try Tynan's shoreside store.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. I'll let you get back to fishing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll let you get back to it.
